mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room ( member_id, title, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{title}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, title, deleted_yn AS deletedYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_room WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' AND member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, title, deleted_yn AS deletedYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_room WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_yn = 'N'

SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, title, deleted_yn AS deletedYn, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_room WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' AND member_id = #{memberId} AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
